title: ortholoma parviflorum
intro: Ortholoma parviflorum, also known as Lesser Yellow Gentian, is a small flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ortholoma parviflorum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve symptoms of indigestion and stomach ulcers, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Ortholoma parviflorum, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
